diff --git a/infra/rate_limiter.tf b/infra/rate_limiter.tf
@@ -10,10 +10,10 @@ resource "aws_lambda_function" "rate_limiter" {
   function_name = "rate-limiter"
   handler       = "main.handler"
   runtime       = "python3.12"
   timeout       = 30
-  memory_size = 256
+  memory_size = 512
   environment {
     TABLE_NAME = "rate_limits"
-    RATE_LIMIT = "100"
+    RATE_LIMIT = "250"
   }
 }
